headline: FedEx amends its long-term incentive plans to account for the upcoming FedEx Freight spin-off and a change in its fiscal year-end.
investor_impact: While the filing is technically an administrative adjustment to executive compensation, it provides a crucial update for investors by confirming the FedEx Freight spin-off remains on track for June 1, 2026. The LTI amendments ensure management remains aligned through the transition, and the shift to a calendar fiscal year (December 31) will require analysts to update their financial models.
key_figures: FY25-FY27 LTI Plan payout calculation: 67% actual performance, 33% target
FY26-FY28 LTI Plan payout calculation: 33% actual performance, 67% target
June 1, 2026 (Planned completion date for FedEx Freight spin-off)
December 31 (New fiscal year-end, changing from May 31)
